items.title: Gene Munster Says Apple Stock's Tepid Reaction To Strong Earnings Beat Comes Down To One Thing: Investors Want More AI Substance
items.description: Despite beating estimates and issuing upbeat guidance, Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) shares barely moved as investors look for clearer evidence that artificial intelligence will meaningfully drive future growth, according to Deepwater Asset Management's Gene Munster. Apple Delivers Strong Quarter — On Paper Apple reported fiscal first-quarter revenue of $143.76 billion, topping Wall Street expectations of $138.42 billion, while earnings came in at $2.84 per share, ahead of estimates of $2.66, accordi

items.title: Amazon’s Potential US$50b OpenAI Deal And What It Means For Investors
items.description: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) is reportedly in advanced talks to invest up to US$50b in OpenAI. The potential deal would be part of a wider US$100b funding round for OpenAI. CEO Andy Jassy is said to be directly involved in discussions with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. If completed, this would be Amazon’s largest external AI investment to date. For you as an investor, this centers on how Amazon positions its core businesses of e commerce, cloud services and digital media around artificial...

items.title: Alexis Ohanian walked out of the LSAT 20 minutes in, went to a Waffle House, and decided he was ‘gonna invent a career.’ He founded Reddit
items.description: Reddit, now worth more than $40 billion, would have never happened without Alexis Ohanian ditching law school in favor of entrepreneurship.

items.title: If You'd Invested $100 in Costco 10 Years Ago, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
items.description: Costco is one of the dominant players in the retail sector.

items.title: Minivan sales surge 21% in 2025 as millennial dads lead demand for cars offering the 'best bang for your buck'
items.description: Most carmakers are only focused on the truck and SUV buyer, but one model saw a surge in popularity last year — the trusty family minivan.
